# ServiceEnvironment Sample

| Field | Value |

| Resource | `servicemanagerproxy/ServiceEnvironment` |

```yaml

# Copyright (c) 2021, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.

#
# ServiceEnvironment is bind-existing and observe-only in this rollout.
# Provide the Service Manager service environment identifier and the
# compartment OCID for an existing environment. The serviceEnvironmentId
# is not an OCID.
#
apiVersion: servicemanagerproxy.oracle.com/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEnvironment
metadata:
  name: serviceenvironment-sample
spec:
  compartmentId: ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleuniqueID
  serviceEnvironmentId: example-service-environment-id
```
